ratingDrivers.description: The harness covers the agent work lifecycle and its guidance agrees with the material it routes to.
Every named catalog sensor is referenced by at least two assessments, except the new drift detector, which appears once as the model-body maturation target.

localAnalysis.rationale: Guidance matches the current layout except one stale command and one maturing drift detector.
